_comment: qwen-code settings for vllm-mlx on Mac Studio. vllm-mlx is single-model — set the baseUrl only when JANGQ-AI/Qwen3.6-27B-JANG_4M is the loaded model (otherwise update id + model.name to match the live /v1/models). vllm-mlx does not require auth; envKey resolves to not-needed. Install target: ~/.qwen/settings.json.

openai.name: Qwen3.6-27B JANG 4M (Mac Studio, vllm-mlx)
openai.description: Dense 27B Qwen3.6 hybrid (Gated DeltaNet + full-attn) + ViT, JANG mixed 4/8-bit, 262K context — served via vllm-mlx as primary
